channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - techraptor.net
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for techraptor.net

item.title: Exclusive Riftbound: Unleashed Card Reveal - Friendship
item.content:encoded:
Riftbound, the League of Legends Card Game, has revealed its third set: Riftbound: Unleashed. After the wildly popular Origins and Spiritforged sets, Unleashed is bringing with it a whole slew of new cards and mechanics. Today, TechRaptor can exclusively reveal the Friendship card, one of the new spells that is sure to be a staple in your next cute Riftbound deck.

Friendship is a Calm (Green) Reaction Spell with a Mana cost of 1, unlike some other spells of that cost. With its ability to grow in power, you'll find use for it no matter where you are in the battle.

Friendship's ability reads "Choose a unit. Give it +1 Might this turn for each of the following tags among your units – Bird, Cat, Dog, and Poro." Whether you're in the early game and need just a slight bump in power to stay on a Battlefield, or save this spell until the end-game to get a big boost of power, depending on your board state, Friendship is a low-cost spell that could turn the tide of battle very quickly.

Friendship will be a useful card for anyone looking to build a deck of their favorite little guys (or hulking beasts).

The artwork for this adorable creature is done by the group Kudos Productions, who have already contributed over 200 pieces of card art to Riftbound.

There's always time for scritches.

New Critters Are Coming

While we're far from knowing all of the cards that will be coming to the Unleashed set, some cards revealed so far include more Dogs and Birds.

Mossstomper is a Calm Dog that has the new Hunt keyword, which will let you earn XP when conquering or holding. There is also a Bird Token Unit that is being introduced. If generating Bird Tokens is anywhere near as fast-paced as some of the other Units, this could be a very quick way to maximize the efforts of Friendship.

Friendship In A Riftbound Deck

At the moment, not including alternate artworks and overnumbered cards, there are 21 cards that fit into the Bird, Cat, Dog, and Poro tag. I'm sure that we'll see this number rise further with the release of Riftbound: Unleashed.

If you want to include a Legend that fits the archetype, you'll be locked into Emperor of the Sands, Azir, for the time being. This Green / Yellow legend is built around creating Sand Soldiers that have Weaponmaster.

To get the most out of the Archetype, though, you'll want to be on the lookout for a Green/Orange deck as that's where the highest concentrations of these archetypes will be as well as the greatest spread of Mana Costs and Might.

As we continue through Riftbound: Unleashed preview season, I know I'll be keeping a keen eye out for some more Birds, Dogs, Cats, and Poros.

Andrew has written Video Game and Entertainment news, reviews, and guides for 10+ years. As Senior Content Manager, he assists in creating and editing… More about Andrew
